//: Structural D1/P2 boundary (fleet review). The DAO enforces guardrails along the sanctioned path, but agents have the Read tool -- these deny rules stop a NON-evaluation agent from reading the ground-truth answer key or raw sources directly with Read, turning D1/P2 from prose into a boundary for the Read tool. NOTE: this does NOT seal Bash-based reads (cat/python/etc.) -- a complete seal needs OS-level permissions on data/ground_truth and the source-cases final reports (see open-decisions.md / known-gaps.md). The evaluation stage still reads ground truth ONLY through `python tools/dao.py read-ground-truth`, which is gated on --caller-stage and the human-review flag.
